display.purpose: Page-level headings and major route titles.

headline.purpose: Panel titles, modal headings, and prominent section labels.

title.purpose: Card titles, form section headers, and compact product surfaces.

body.purpose: Default UI copy, chat metadata, menus, tables, and settings text.

label.purpose: Badges, metadata, field labels, and small navigation details.

shadows.name: soft-card
shadows.purpose: Login panels, attachment chips, and compact raised surfaces.

shadows.name: popover-lift
shadows.purpose: Tooltips, popovers, dropdowns, and chart tooltips.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Fast control reveal, hover, and slide-in state changes.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Default prompt, button, and panel state transitions.

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Primary ink button for core product actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 0; border-radius: calc(0.625rem - 2px); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25 var(--font-geist-sans); transition: background 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-default:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex: none; }

components.name: Brand Button
components.description: Rust action button for product-signature actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 0; border-radius: calc(0.625rem - 2px); background: var(--brand); color: var(--brand-foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25 var(--font-geist-sans); transition: background 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-brand:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); } .ds-btn-brand:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact field for forms, filters, and settings.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans); } .ds-label { color: var(--foreground); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input { height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; min-width: 0; border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: calc(0.625rem - 2px); background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 var(--font-geist-sans); transition: color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Coworker Card
components.description: Selectable operational summary for a coworker.
components.html:
Email Check

Checks the latest customer emails.

On
Gmail2 skills

Last run: complete - 12m

Coworker
components.css: .ds-coworker-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; min-height: 180px; padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: calc(0.625rem + 4px); background: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-coworker-card:hover { border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 30%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted) 30%, transparent); } .ds-coworker-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); } .ds-card-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; } .ds-card-top h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-top p, .ds-run { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.333; } .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 1.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, green 20%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, green 10%, transparent); color: rgb(22 101 52); padding: 0 0.625rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-status span { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgb(34 197 94); } .ds-badges { display: flex; gap: 0.375rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-badges span, footer span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--muted); color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; } footer { margin-top: auto; padding-top: 0.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } footer button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border: 0; border-radius: calc(0.625rem - 2px); background: transparent; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted-foreground) 30%, transparent); transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } footer button:hover { background: var(--muted); color: var(--foreground); } footer svg { width: 0.875rem; height: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Prompt Bar
components.description: Signature rounded input dock for chat and automation prompts.
components.css: .ds-prompt { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 60%, transparent); border-radius: 1rem; background: color-mix(in oklch, rgb(250 250 249) 80%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans); transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-prompt:focus-within { border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 60%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 25%, transparent); } .ds-prompt textarea { display: block; width: 100%; min-height: 88px; resize: none; border: 0; outline: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); padding: 1rem 1.25rem 0.5rem; font: 400 0.9375rem/1.625 var(--font-geist-sans); } .ds-prompt textarea::placeholder { color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted-foreground) 40%, transparent); } .ds-prompt-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem 0.75rem; } .ds-prompt-actions button { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 0; border-radius: calc(0.625rem + 2px); background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground); transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-prompt-actions button:hover { background: var(--muted); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-prompt-actions button:last-child { margin-left: auto; background: rgb(41 37 36); color: rgb(250 250 249); } .ds-prompt-actions button:last-child:hover { background: rgb(68 64 60); } .ds-prompt-actions svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; }

components.name: User Message Bubble
components.description: Compact right-aligned bubble for user messages.
components.html: what is my latest Gmail?
components.css: .ds-message-row { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans); } .ds-message-user { max-width: 80%; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; white-space: pre-wrap; }

components.name: Tag Badge
components.description: Small pill chip for coworker tags and tool counts.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 50%, transparent); border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted) 60%, transparent); color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font: 500 0.6875rem/1.2 var(--font-geist-sans); transition: color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tag:hover { border-color: var(--border); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-tag-dot { width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--brand); box-shadow: 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand) 25%, transparent); }

narrative.overview:
CmdClaw is a product UI for people asking agents to act across real company systems. The interface should feel like a precise operations console: quiet, durable, and legible under repeated use. It is not a showpiece; it is a working surface for chat, coworker runs, approvals, connected identities, and runtime status.

The current system is restrained by default: near-neutral surfaces, compact controls, thin borders, sparse shadows, and one warm rust brand accent for trust and action. The physical scene is a focused operator moving between conversations, inbox state, and integration settings on a laptop during the workday. Light mode is the primary posture because the app is used alongside documents, email, and admin tools; dark mode exists as an alternate state, not the brand.

The product language in `CONTEXT.md` is exacting, and the UI should match that precision. Avoid vague SaaS gloss, theatrical AI gradients, oversized marketing composition inside the authenticated app, and any visual treatment that makes agent execution look decorative instead of accountable.
keyCharacteristics: Dense but calm: more console than brochure.
Tokenized neutral layers with one warm operational accent.
Rounded controls, thin borders, and state-first motion.
Geist typography, small sizes, high readability, no ornamental type.
Components expose status, ownership, and action without spectacle.

rules.name: The Warm Signal Rule
rules.body: Rust appears for brand selection, focus, and intentional action. It must not be sprayed across every metric, badge, and icon.

rules.name: The Neutral Does The Work Rule
rules.body: Most hierarchy comes from border, spacing, typography, and muted surfaces. Add color only when it clarifies state or action.

rules.name: The Small Surface Rule
rules.body: Authenticated app screens should use compact type by default. Reserve hero-scale typography for the public marketing shell only.

rules.name: The Exact Term Rule
rules.body: UI copy must preserve the repo language: Connected Account, Connected Identity, Integration Type, Generation, Runtime Progress, and related terms should not be casually renamed.

rules.name: The Flat Until Needed Rule
rules.body: A surface is flat unless it floats, accepts text, or temporarily interrupts the page.

rules.name: The Border Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Try a token border before adding shadow. If the screen looks like stacked cards, remove elevation.

dos: Do use the existing OKLCH tokens from `apps/web/src/app/globals.css`; do not introduce one-off hex colors for app UI.
Do keep authenticated app layouts dense, scannable, and operational.
Do use Rust Signal for brand action, selected state, focus, and identity moments.
Do separate surfaces with `border-border`, muted fills, and spacing before adding shadows.
Do use Lucide icons inside icon buttons and include accessible names where the button has no text.
Do preserve exact domain terms from `CONTEXT.md`, especially Connected Account, Connected Identity, Integration Type, Generation, and Runtime Progress.
Do keep motion short and state-based: `150ms` to `200ms`, opacity and transform only.
donts: Don't use `#000` or `#fff`; use foreground, background, primary, and primary-foreground tokens.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative blur cards, or purple-blue AI surfaces.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't turn every screen into a grid of identical icon cards.
Don't place cards inside cards. If a panel needs sections, use borders, separators, or unframed grouping.
Don't rename product terms to generic labels like account, provider account, run, source, client, or logs when the domain term is known.
Don't use modal dialogs as the first answer for ordinary editing or filtering flows.
